'''Wyrn Otro''' worked for [[Galentro Heavy Works]] corporation, unswervingly loyal as he regarded it as his only family. He represented the corporation at the [[Pentastar Talks]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. While he signed the [[Pentastar Alignment Treaty]], recognizing the need to align with a party to avoid being absorbed into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], he had personal reservations about [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Ardus Kaine]], worrying that the formation of the [[Pentastar Alignment]] was only a way to gain personal power.
